message:
feat(fnp-python): native roll + guarded LinAlgError fallback

Port np.roll to native via UFuncArray::roll / roll_multi for scalar and
tuple-of-shifts paths; fall back to numpy.roll for non-numeric dtypes,
mismatched-length tuples, or non-int shifts so the full numpy dispatch
surface stays exact. Guard LinAlgError re-export with a lazy module-level
__getattr__ fallback when numpy isn't importable at init (stripped-down
CI workers); test skips the LinAlgError name when numpy_available(py) is
false. All 395 fnp-python lib tests green under both serial and parallel
runs.

br-franken_numpy-hswa
br-franken_numpy-k74v.5
